context.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 20?
context.market_title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 20?

decision.primary_crux: The move from a prior fair-value center near 0.825 to a market price of 0.895 is best treated as repricing rather than a broken thesis: BTC is still more likely than not to close above $70,000 on the April 20 noon ET Binance minute, but the market is now too rich for a five-day, single-minute settlement where a normal 5-6% pullback can still decide the outcome.
secondary_cruxes: There is no major contract blocker; the disagreement remains pricing of residual five-day path risk, not source identity.
The decisive settlement candle does not yet exist, so the remaining downside path cannot be independently verified away today.
Current spot around 74k supports a strong Yes baseline, but not enough to justify high-80s pricing without stronger independent volatility evidence.

valuation.compression_reason: No new bounded evidence justifies lifting fair value; the refresh added price movement but not stronger verification that residual five-day downside or exact-minute settlement risk has materially shrunk.

portfolio_constraints: Do not add fresh exposure at the updated market price.
Treat exact-minute Binance settlement risk as the dominant execution constraint even with a favorable current spot regime.
Reopen only if market cheapens materially or later same-venue checks show the cushion holding with reduced downside risk.

bands.name: max_enter
bands.notes: Would require a much cheaper price and still refreshed same-venue confirmation.

bands.name: scaled_enter
bands.notes: Potential value zone only if BTC remains comfortably above 70k and downside regime stays benign.

bands.name: hold
bands.notes: Bounded fair-value zone; maintain watch-only hold posture.

bands.name: trim
bands.notes: Above fair value for a one-minute settlement contract with meaningful five-day path dependence.

bands.name: exit
bands.notes: Avoid or exit at rich prices because exact-minute downside tail dominates residual uncertainty.

thesis_breakers: BTC loses cushion and trades back toward 71k-70k on Binance before the Apr 20 fixing window.
A major downside crypto, macro, geopolitical, or exchange-specific shock materially raises the probability of a sub-70k settlement minute.
Binance operational or settlement-surface issues emerge near resolution.
time_breakers: A fresh direct Binance observation closer to Apr 20 12:00 ET should supersede this packet before any action.
The actual Apr 20 12:00 ET Binance 1-minute close fully resolves and obsoletes this judgment.
market_structure_breakers: Market reprices materially again without corresponding same-venue spot deterioration, changing the value comparison.
Binance microstructure or liquidity behavior near the fixing window becomes abnormal.
reversal_conditions: Upgrade only if price becomes materially cheaper relative to fair value or if later pre-fix Binance checks show a still-strong cushion with reduced downside risk.
Downgrade if BTC loses cushion or if downside volatility or catalyst risk increases.
Do not auto-reverse from this packet.

key_uncertainties: The true probability of a 5-6% pullback landing exactly on the settlement minute.
Whether the current 74k spot regime persists through the weekend into Monday noon ET.
How much exact-minute Binance settlement handling deserves additional discount despite otherwise clear rules.
what_would_change_my_mind: Later same-venue checks showing BTC still comfortably above 72k-73k into Apr. 18-19 would move me somewhat closer to market.
A move back toward 70k or lower would reduce fair value materially.
A materially cheaper market price with unchanged Binance cushion would create a cleaner edge.
reasons_to_pass: The updated market price is above bounded fair value.
This is a one-minute single-venue settlement contract where path risk matters more than broad BTC direction.
The refresh added price movement, not new evidence supporting a higher probability.

audit.one_sentence_rationale: BTC is still more likely than not to finish above $70,000 on the April 20 Binance noon minute, but the market's move to 0.895 pushes price above fair value centered near 0.825, so the disciplined output remains watch-only because meaningful five-day exact-minute path risk is still live.
audit.notes: This refresh is primarily a valuation deterioration: same directional Yes, weaker execution case after repricing.
